text: All M-items landed: TriangularSolve public API + dtrsv kernel (LU/Cholesky/QR route through it); CSR/CSC/COO canonicalization surface (hasCanonicalFormat/sortedIndices/pruneZeros/prune/canonicalize); Banded format with band kernels; CSC op parity via zero-copy transpose reuse; real Golub-Kahan/Paige-Saunders lsqr (cgnr retained); initial guess is Option[DVec] with dimension errors; gale-laws cross-built module with VecLaws/MatrixLaws/SparseLaws/SolverLaws bundles (core->laws test-scope dependency is an sbt cycle, so law suites live in laws/test — standard pattern, flagged); CI workflow (JVM 3.3.8 + Scala Next non-gating + bench + Wasm link-only allow-failure; NOT executed locally, YAML structurally validated); GALE_WASM linker toggle off by default; testAllFull fullLinkJS alias; root README; scaladoc pass (view-vs-copy, NaN/beta==0, positive-stride, Cholesky lower-only, tolerance semantics, interop shadow contract). Evidence: clean build testAll core 143/143 JVM+JS + laws 17/17 JVM+JS, benchCompile green, fullLinkJS links, benchSmokeJSFull runs.
